headline: Moderna (MRNA) Valuation Check As Patent Dispute Settlement And Cancer Therapy Pivot Refocus Investor Attention
summary: Moderna (MRNA) is back in focus after settling a large patent dispute and outlining its push into individualized cancer therapies, a shift that coincides with increased attention on its broader vaccine pipeline. See our latest analysis for Moderna. At a share price of US$50.80, Moderna has seen a 72.26% 90 day share price return and an 87.04% 1 year total shareholder return, while the 3 year total shareholder return is down 67.54%. This suggests that recent momentum has picked up after a...
